---
title: "Class 11"
author: "Dhruvi Sheth 22294"
date: "30 Jan 2026"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_notebook: default
---

```{r}
pnorm(166, mean = 160, 6)
```


```{r}
# the probability of x
qnorm (0.8413447, mean = 160, 6)

```

```{r}
dnorm (166, 160, 6)
```

```{r}
pnorm(166.05, 160, 6)- pnorm(165.95, 160, 6)
```

```{r}
# check normality: plotm check,test

x_1 <- rnorm (100, 170, 7)
hist(x_1)
```

```{r}
qqnorm(x_1)
qqline(x_1)
```
```{r}
# for test: stat test
# give p value, a test of normality
# null hyp is, Null = N(u, sigma)
# alt hyp  = Null not true


# if p > 0.05 = accept the null hypothesis
# if p < 0.05 = reject the null hypothesis

shapiro.test(x_1)
```

```{r}
# Mean points plot
x1 <- rnorm(25,170,7)
sd(x1)
se1 <- sd(x1)/sqrt(25)
se1
```

```{r}
x2 <- rnorm(50,170,7)
sd(x2)
se2 <- sd(x2)/sqrt(50)
se2
```



```{r}
x3 <- rnorm(75,170,7)
sd(x3)
```

```{r}
x4 <- rnorm(150,170,7)
sd(x4)
```

```{r}
x5 <- rnorm(500,170,7)
sd(x5)
```

```{r}
x6 <- rnorm(600,170,7)
sd(x6)
```

```{r}
# lambda = 5
rpois(50, 5)
```

```{r}
# replicate - will have vector of means
mean(rpois(50,5))
```

```{r}
rpois_vector_mean <- replicate(100, mean(rpois(50,5)))
rpois_vector_mean
```

```{r}
hist(rpois_vector_mean)
```
```{r}
qqnorm(rpois_vector_mean)
qqline(rpois_vector_mean)
```

```{r}
shapiro.test(rpois_vector_mean)
```

```{r}
runif <- runif(rpois_vector_mean)
hist(runif)
```
